stemHtml: Which of the following scenarios involves an example of sensory adaptation?

options.a: Flying at constant altitude and wagging the wings in a periodic manner.
options.b: Flying a curve with a constant turn rate that lasts for more than 30 seconds.
options.c: Performing a looping manoeuvre, initiated at 200 km/h, with an overhead speed of 100 km/h.
options.d: Flying a spin manoeuvre of 360° in VMC by day.
